description: Detects type confusion risks in Go: unsafe.Pointer casts, unguarded type assertions, and uintptr conversions. JSON version matches type_assertion_expression (all type assertions flagged -- cannot distinguish guarded from unguarded without #match? predicate). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Type assertion detected -- verify this uses comma-ok pattern (val, ok := x.(Type)) to avoid panic at runtime
